description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical disposable coffee cup with a slightly tapered body, made primarily of white material. The cup features a fitted, domed plastic lid with a small drinking slot, typical of takeaway coffee cups. On one side, there is a prominent green and white circular logo resembling the Starbucks Coffee branding, which stands out against the plain white surface. The cup's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The lid appears to be made of a different, slightly shinier plastic material than the cup body. The overall design is minimalistic, with the only decoration being the logo.
description: A tall, white disposable coffee cup with a domed plastic lid and a green Starbucks-style logo on one side. The surface is smooth and glossy, with a minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white cup with a domed lid and the green Starbucks-style logo clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the logo partially visible and the drinking slot on the lid apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view of the cup, showing only the plain white surface and the lid, with no logo visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the plain white surface and the drinking slot on the lid.
